descs.desc:
[WhenUse] If target has 5+ [Sinking], Coin Power +1
[WinDuel] Inflict +2 [Sinking] Count

coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 3 [EchoOfMansion] next turn
[OnSucceedAttack] If target has [EchoOfMansion], inflict Gloom Affinity damage equal to half of [Sinking] Potency on target (max 20)

descs.desc:
[WhenUse] If target has 7+ [Sinking], Coin Power +1
[WinDuel] Inflict +3 [Sinking] Count
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 3 [EchoOfMansion] next turn
[OnSucceedAttack] If target has [EchoOfMansion], inflict Gloom Affinity damage equal to [Sinking] Potency on target (max 30)

1110801.name: The Mistress's Voice...!
1110801.desc:
- When clashing against targets with less than -25 SP, Clash Power +1 and deal +10% damage
- Deal +15% damage against targets with [EchoOfMansion]
- When winning a Clash without losing a single Coin, heal 10 SP. If this unit is already at max SP, gain 2 [AttackUp] next turn (2 times per turn)

1110811.name: The Mistress's Voice...!
1110811.desc:
- When clashing against targets with less than 0 SP, Clash Power +1 and deal +20% damage
- Deal +30% damage against targets with [EchoOfMansion]
- When winning a Clash without losing a single Coin, heal 10 SP. If this unit is already at max SP, gain 3 [AttackUp] next turn (2 times per turn)

1110821.name: Butler Training
1110821.desc: Clash Power +1 to 1 ally with the most SP when clashing against targets with less than -25 SP

1110831.name: Butler Training
1110831.desc: Clash Power +1 to 1 ally with the most SP when clashing against targets with less than -25 SP
